description: Parameters to instantiate Fluentd with MQTT input

mqtt-host.title: MQTT broker host
mqtt-host.description: Hostname or IP address of the MQTT broker to subscribe to

mqtt-topic.title: MQTT topic
mqtt-topic.description: MQTT topic to subscribe to. Wildcards '#' (multi-level) and '+' (single-level) are supported.

mqtt-tag.title: Fluentd tag
mqtt-tag.description: Fluentd tag to assign to received MQTT messages. Defaults to the MQTT topic with '/' replaced by '.'.

mqtt-ssl-enabled.title: Enable SSL/TLS
mqtt-ssl-enabled.description: Enable SSL/TLS for the MQTT broker connection

wendelin-ingestion-url.title: Wendelin ingestion URL
wendelin-ingestion-url.description: Ingestion endpoint URL of the Wendelin Telecom instance to which the data is to be forwarded

username.title: Wendelin account username
username.description: The username of a valid account to authenticate with on the Wendelin instance

password.title: Wendelin account password
password.description: The password of the account to authenticate with on the Wendelin instance

flush-interval.title: Buffer flushing interval
flush-interval.description: Delay after which the data buffer is flushed to the output

buffer-file-chunk-limit-size.title: Buffer file chunk limit size
buffer-file-chunk-limit-size.description: Maximum size of each individual buffer chunk.
